dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of Community Forest User Group metrics.

survey.title: Survey Form
survey.noForms: No survey forms yet. Create one to get started.

cutting.title: Cutting Register
cutting.noRegisters: No cutting registers yet. Create one to get started.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Manage fee collections and view issued receipts.

feeCollections.title: Fee Collections
feeCollections.cardDescription: Record membership fees, renewals, royalties, visitor entry fees, and other payments from members.
feeCollections.subtitle: Track and manage member payments.
feeCollections.newSubtitle: Record a new fee collection from a member.

receipts.title: Receipts
receipts.cardDescription: Browse issued receipts for sales, fee collections, and visitor entries.
receipts.subtitle: View issued receipts across the system.

forest.title: Forest Resources
forest.subtitle: Manage forest blocks, tree species, and tree counts.

blocks.title: Forest Blocks
blocks.emptyTreeCounts: No tree counts recorded for this block.

species.title: Tree Species
species.emptyTreeCounts: No tree counts recorded for this species.

treeCounts.title: Tree Count Register
treeCounts.subtitle: Baseline and remaining tree counts by species and block.
treeCounts.newSubtitle: Register a baseline tree count for a species and block.
treeCounts.toastFailed: Failed to create tree count entry
treeCounts.toastFailedDesc: A record for this species/block combination may already exist.
treeCounts.historyUnavailable: History tracking isn’t available yet — the backend endpoint for it hasn’t been added. This section will list past adjustments and harvest-linked changes once that’s in place.

fund.title: Fund Management
fund.subtitle: Track cash transactions, bank accounts, and fund allocation rules.

cashTransactions.title: Cash Transactions
cashTransactions.cardDescription: Record income and expense transactions for the fund.
cashTransactions.subtitle: Track fund income and expenses.
cashTransactions.newSubtitle: Record a new income or expense transaction.

bankAccounts.title: Bank Accounts
bankAccounts.cardDescription: Manage community fund bank accounts and authorized signatories.
bankAccounts.subtitle: Manage community fund bank accounts and signatories.
bankAccounts.newSubtitle: Register a new bank account for the community fund.
bankAccounts.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this bank account?

allocationRules.title: Allocation Rules
allocationRules.cardDescription: Configure minimum allocation percentages for forest development and poor-targeted programs.
allocationRules.subtitle: Configure fund allocation percentages.
allocationRules.newSubtitle: Set minimum allocation percentages for fund distribution.
allocationRules.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this allocation rule?

governance.title: Governance
governance.subtitle: Manage committee members and monitor governance quotas.

committeeMembers.title: Committee Members
committeeMembers.cardDescription: Track committee positions, terms, gender representation, and active status.
committeeMembers.subtitle: Manage the executive committee.
committeeMembers.newSubtitle: Assign a member to a committee position.
committeeMembers.confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove this committee member?

harvest.title: Harvest Requests
harvest.subtitle: Member and forest-initiated timber harvest requests.
harvest.searchPlaceholder: Search by member, species, or operation...
harvest.memberSubtitle: Submit a harvest request for your own use.
harvest.adminSubtitle: Submit a member-requested or forest-initiated harvest request.
harvest.onlyActiveMembers: Only active members can submit harvest requests.
harvest.toastFailedDesc: Please check the form and try again.
harvest.rejectNotesRequired: Notes are required to reject a request
harvest.confirmDelete: Delete this harvest request? This cannot be undone.

inventory.title: Inventory & Sales
inventory.subtitle: Manage forest product inventory and recent sales.

priceRates.title: Price Rates
priceRates.subtitle: Standard rates by species, grade, and buyer type.
priceRates.newSubtitle: Set a standard rate for a species, grade, and buyer type.
priceRates.toastFailedDesc: A rate for this exact combination and date may already exist.
priceRates.confirmDelete: Delete this price rate? This cannot be undone.

inventory.priceRatesDescription: Standard rates by species, grade, and buyer type — used to auto-fill sale prices.

ledgers.newSubtitle: Create a stock ledger for a species and grade.
ledgers.gradeDescription: Available quantity starts at 0 and is tracked via stock transactions.
ledgers.toastFailedEntryDesc: An entry for this species/grade may already exist.

sales.title: Sales
sales.subtitle: All recorded forest product sales.
sales.newSubtitle: Record a forest product sale and deduct from stock.
sales.standardRate: Standard rate for this species/grade/buyer type: {rate}
sales.auditNote: Audit Note (required — rate differs from standard rate)
sales.auditNotePlaceholder: Reason for manually adjusting the rate
sales.toastFailedDesc: Stock may be insufficient or another error occurred.
sales.rateChangedError: Please explain why the rate was changed from the standard rate
sales.memberRequired: Member is required when buyer type is member

livelihood.title: Livelihood Programs
livelihood.subtitle: Manage revolving fund loans and livelihood support programs for households.

revolvingLoans.title: Revolving Loans
revolvingLoans.cardDescription: Track loans issued to households, repayment progress, and loan status.
revolvingLoans.subtitle: Track household loans and repayments.
revolvingLoans.newSubtitle: Issue a new revolving fund loan to a household.

members.title: Households
members.subtitle: Manage community forest member households.
members.newSubtitle: Register a new household in the CFUG.

people.title: People
people.subtitle: All registered individuals in the CFUG.
people.toastFailedDesc: Please check the form and try again.
people.noHousehold: No household specified. Go back and select a household first.

offense.title: Offense Tracking
offense.subtitle: Record offense reports, manage resolutions, and log patrol activity.

reports.title: Offense Reports
reports.cardDescription: Track forest violations, damages, fines, and case resolutions.
reports.subtitle: Track violations and resolutions.
reports.newSubtitle: Record a new forest offense or violation.
reports.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this offense report?

patrolLogs.title: Patrol Logs
patrolLogs.cardDescription: Log patrol rounds by community watchers and link observations to offenses.
patrolLogs.subtitle: Track community patrol rounds and observations.
patrolLogs.newSubtitle: Record a patrol round and any observations.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure price rates, visitor fees, fund allocation rules, and bank accounts.
settings.readOnlyNotice: You have read-only access. Contact a committee officer to make changes.
settings.timberPriceRatesDesc: Per-species, per-grade rates for member and outsider buyers.
settings.deletePriceRateDesc: This will permanently remove the rate for <species/> grade <grade/> ({buyerType}).
settings.visitorFeeRatesDesc: Daily fee per visitor for each visit purpose type.
settings.emptyVisitorFeeRates: No visitor fee rates configured yet.
settings.fundAllocationRulesDesc: Minimum percentage allocations for forest development and poverty-targeted programs.
settings.bankAccountsDesc: Registered CFUG bank accounts and signatory requirements.

visitors.title: Visitors
visitors.subtitle: Log visitor entries and track official guest visits to the community forest.

entries.title: Visitor Entries
entries.cardDescription: Record general visits and study/research visits, including visitor counts, days stayed, fees collected, and fee waivers.
entries.subtitle: Log and track visitors to the community forest.
entries.newSubtitle: Record a new visitor entry and collect applicable fees.

officialGuests.title: Official Guests
officialGuests.cardDescription: Track visits by government officials, VIPs, and other distinguished guests, including designation, visit dates, and guidance provided.
officialGuests.subtitle: Track visits by officials and distinguished guests.
officialGuests.newSubtitle: Record a visit by an official or distinguished guest.
officialGuests.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this official guest record?
